title: stevia constricta
intro: Stevia constricta, also known as the Chilean stevia or Paraguayan stevia, is a species of perennial herb in the sunflower family that is native to the Andes region of South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Stevia constricta include its potential to help lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for various health concerns. Stevia constricta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
